segment.source: Renders an accessible table with a feature column and two option columns (defaults Free and Pro); each row marks a feature as included with a check or excluded with a dash — boolean values only, no text cells. Use it for: yes/no availability lists contrasting exactly two plans, editions, or product variants. Prefer 'Feature Comparison Matrix' when cells hold text values like limits or quotas; 'Plan Comparison Matrix' for up to four pricing plans.
